# ANALYSIS: LBFS_FBW_OP21_N15_THRESHOLD

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  
**Status:** DRAFT (informational)

## Objective

Compute win rate (WR) and P&L breakdown for LBFS_VIX_GATED_ATM by break_below_cents threshold and for FBW_MORNING_MID by time band, then determine the minimum live-observation threshold (i.e., most restrictive setting) that would have satisfied the OP-21 N≥15 gate historically.

## LBFS_VIX_GATED_ATM – break_below_cents breakdown

Based on `analysis/recommendations/lbfs-expanded-real-fills.json` (cited in leaderboard #18):

| break_below_cents_min | N (trades) | Wins | Losses | WR | P&L ($) | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0c (unfiltered) | 17 | 10 | 7 | 58.8% | +763 | ATM real-fills baseline (chart-stop-only, premium_stop=-0.99) |
| 50c | 15 | 10 | 5 | 66.7% | ~+1,144* | Includes one false-break loss (54c) + 4 ribbon-flip losses |
| 100c | 14 | 10 | 4 | 71.4% | +1,525 | Excludes all three false-break losses (23c,27c,54c); retains 4 ribbon-flip losses |
| 150c | 14 | 10 | 4 | 71.4% | +1,525 | Same as 100c (no additional losses between 100-150c) |
| 200c | 14 | 10 | 4 | 71.4% | +1,525 | Same |

\*P&L estimate derived from linear interpolation between unfiltered (+763) and filtered (+1,525) assuming the 54c loss contributed approximately -$382 relative to the baseline (see note below).

**Note on P&L estimation:** The three false-break losses have bbc values 23c, 27c, 54c. Removing all three (bbc≥100c) increases P&L by +$762 (from +763 to +1,525). Assuming equal impact per loss (~+$254 each), retaining only the 54c loss would add ~+$254 to the baseline, yielding ~+$1,017; however the remaining two small losses (23c,27c) still detract. A rough midpoint gives ~+$1,144. Exact P&L requires re-running the simulator with bbc_min=50c.

## FBW_MORNING_MID – time band breakdown

Based on timing-split analysis in leaderboard #19:

| Time band | N (trades) | Wins | Losses | WR | P&L ($) | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| EARLY (09:35-10:30) | 6 | 4 | 2 | 66.7% | -$351 | Net negative; fails OP-21 N≥15 gate (N<15) |
| LATE (10:30-11:30) | 29 | 22 | 7 | 75.9% | +$806 | Meets N≥15 gate; WF ratio=2.373 (pattern strengthening) |
| LATE + HIGH_MID (conf≥0.73) | 12 | 11 | 1 | 91.7% | +$937 | High-confidence sub-tier (N<15) |
| LATE + LOW_MID (conf∈[0.65,0.73)) | 17 | 11 | 6 | 64.7% | -$131 | Low-confidence sub-tier (N≥15 but negative P&L) |

## Minimum live-observation threshold passing OP-21 N≥15 gate

- **LBFS_VIX_GATED_ATM:** The highest break_below_cents_min that still yields N≥15 is **50c**. At this threshold N=15 (10 wins, 5 losses). Any threshold ≥55c drops N to 14 (<15) because all three false-break losses (bbc<100c) are excluded, leaving only the 4 ribbon-flip losses.
- **FBW_MORNING_MID:** The time band that satisfies N≥15 is the **LATE window (10:30-11:30 ET)** with N=29. The EARLY window fails (N=6). Within LATE, the HIGH_MID sub-tier fails N≥15 (N=12), but the gate is defined on the overall time band, not confidence sub-tier.

## OP-20 disclosures (for transparency)

1. **Account-size assumption:** Qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline P&L.
2. **Sample bias:** LBFS N=17 across 4 regimes (2025-Q1/Q2, Q2/Q3, Q4/2026-Q1, 2026-Q1/Q2). FBW N=35 real-fills across 14/14 months. Both samples are walk-forward stable but may overfit to recent regime; out-of-sample validation pending.
3. **Out-of-sample:** LBFS WF ratio=2.207 (N=5 IS, N=9 OOS) – directional confirmation only. FBW OOS WR=78.9% > train WR=68.8% (pattern strengthening). Both NEEDS-OOS for formal gate.
4. **Real-fills:** LBFS ATM real-fills PASS (chart-stop-only). FBW real-fills PASS (N=35 WR=74.3% P&L=+$455). Both have real-fills validation.
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - LBFS: ribbon-flip exits (bbc=289c-2806c) are structural and not filterable; false-break losses removed by bbc≥100c.
   - FBW: EARLY window suffers from adverse selection (premium stop misfires); LOW_MID confidence sub-tier generates negative P&L despite N≥15.
6. **Concentration:** 
   - LBFS: top-5 days = ~55% of P&L (estimate from leaderboard #18 note: top-2 dates 59.8% of VIX_MODERATE raw P&L; deduped reduces). 
   - FBW: leaderboard #19 states max_month_share=13.5% (well-distributed).

## Pre-merge gate

<what tests need to pass: gym validators, walk-forward, real-fills>

- For LBFS: gym validators, walk-forward with bbc_min=50c, real-fills confirmation of N≥15 live observations in VIX≥20 regime.
- For FBW: gym validators, walk-forward confirming LATE window superiority, real-fills accumulation of 3 live J-confirmed observations in LATE band.

## Confidence

8 / 10 -- Based on cited leaderboard data and timing-split analysis; exact P&L at bbc_min=50c requires Stage-1 backtest.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

<does this conflict with / complement candidates 1-9 in _LEADERBOARD.md?>

This analysis does not propose a new candidate; it informs existing candidates #18 (LBFS_VIX_GATED_ATM) and #19 (FBW_MORNING_MID). It suggests that LBFS could tighten its break_below_cents filter to 50c to maintain OP-21 eligibility while improving WR, and that FBW should retain the LATE time band (already deployed per OP-22 engine-benefit). No conflict with leaderboard rankings.
